pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 1.5.9.RELEASE to 2.3.0.RELEASE to support Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.5.x does not support Java 11; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 8 APIs, which may not be sufficient or intended for the Java 11 migration context, though strictly speaking Java 8 code runs on Java 11. However, in the context of a 'move to Java 11', this is the primary configuration change enabling the new baseline.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from spring-boot-starter-data-redis to rely on Spring Boot BOM management.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x manages dependency versions via the parent POM; explicit versions from 1.5.x may conflict or be ignored, but removing it is standard practice for the upgrade.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-configuration-processor dependency for metadata generation.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code.
Exclude junit-vintage-engine from spring-boot-starter-test to enforce JUnit 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.3+ defaults to JUnit 5; excluding vintage prevents accidental use of JUnit 4 tests if not intended, though not strictly a compile failure.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Spring Cloud dependency management block as it is no longer used or needed in this simplified setup.
Remove spotify docker-maven-plugin in favor of Spring Boot's built-in docker support or other tooling.
Update project version to 2.0.0 to reflect the major upgrade.
Update project description to mention Java 11.
pom.xml.before: <description>Spring Boot Project for WebSocket Notification using Redis Pub/Sub</description>
pom.xml.after: <description>Spring Boot Project for WebSocket Notification/Chat using Redis Pub/Sub - Java 11</description>

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/SpringR.general_idea: Remove the RestTemplate bean definition from the main application class.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Replace manual getter and setter methods with Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate code.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.before: public String getCount() { return count; } public void setCount(String count) { this.count = count; }

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Remove the final modifier from the topic field to allow Lombok @Setter to generate a setter method.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.before: private final Topic topic = new Topic();

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Replace System.out.println calls with SLF4J logger for proper logging.
Replace deprecated AbstractWebSocketMessageBrokerConfigurer with WebSocketMessageBrokerConfigurer interface.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.why_exists: AbstractWebSocketMessageBrokerConfigurer is deprecated in Spring Framework 5.0+ and removed in later versions; using it causes deprecation warnings or compilation errors depending on the Spring Boot version.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Rename logger field from LOGGER to log to follow common naming conventions.
Update logger references to use the new field name 'log'.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/control.general_idea: Rename the logger field from LOGGER to log to align with common Java naming conventions.
Update all usages of the logger field to match the new name 'log'.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/service.general_idea: Rename the static logger field from LOG to log to follow standard Java naming conventions.
Update logger usage to match the renamed field.

src/test/java/com/github/rawsanj/SpringR.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 and Spring Test annotations from an empty test class.
Remove unused imports for JUnit 4 and Spring Test classes.
